hints.text: Plates have a **red strip** (also seen in Albania, very rarely the UAE)
**Silver car with four bars** visible; all coverage is **Gen3** (no similar-landscape country has this car)
**Kyrgyz Cyrillic** w/ extra letters **Ө Ү Ң** (not in Russian Cyrillic)
All covered in **winter** (leafless trees, drab, snow in many parts); trees & poles painted **white at the bottom**
Simple **white bollards w/ a diagonal black stripe** near the top
km markers with a **red-and-white triangle pattern** are unique to Kyrgyzstan
Majority **Muslim** → many mosques throughout the country
Very limited coverage; **car-mirror meta** narrows region (southern mirror is more diagonal → Osh/Manas); **Lake Issyk-Kul** in the north; divided roads → around Bishkek
